title: Simulate a minimal no-code workflow for: current X trend lookup, prior-post overlap check, stale draft replacement selection, and verification. Return a terse ordered checklist only.
summary_text: 1. Set the workflow scope (date/time window, language/country, keyword list) and confirm source: X Trends only. 2. Pull the top current trend queries from X for that window. 3. For each trend, collect 3–5 recent relevant candidate posts from the queue/drafts. 4. Run prior-post overlap check: match candidates against the last 30 days of published/queued X posts by topic, keyword, hashtag, and linked URL. 5. Mark each candidate as `OVERLAP` if similarity threshold is high (same hook, same image asset, or same source angle), otherwise `CLEAR`. 6. Identify stale drafts by age (`>14 days`) and zero/low engagement or unresolved edits. 7. For `OVERLAP` candidates, select the oldest valid stale draft for replacement; for `CLEAR` candidates, keep draft as-is if still fresh. 8. Draft replacement plan: merge highest-priority trend with selected stale draft slot, rewrite headline + core angle to avoid duplication. 9. Verify before publish: trend freshness, no policy conflict, no overlap with prior-posts, media/source accuracy, and required fields complete. 10. Return decision: - `APPROVE` if all checks pass. - `HOLD/REJECT` if any required verification fails.
